title: A Familiar Child
description: The child from the roadside has found you again.

helped_orphan.title: A Promise Remembered
helped_orphan.description: The child you helped runs toward you wearing clean clothes and a hopeful smile. They have found safety—and came back to thank you.

gave_orphan_gold.title: Coins Well Spent
gave_orphan_gold.description: The child recognizes you immediately. Your coins bought food and shelter, but now they ask whether generosity was all you had to offer.

ignored_orphan.title: The Child You Left Behind
ignored_orphan.description: A young pickpocket is caught reaching for your purse. When they look up, you recognize the child you abandoned in the rain.

options.title: Offer Them a Place
options.description: Make room beside your fire and prove that this meeting can end differently.

options.title: Ask What They Know
options.description: Streetwise eyes notice opportunities that heroes often miss.

options.title: Send Them Away
options.description: Whatever happened before, you cannot carry every burden on the road.
